connection.name: Indicator
connection.expression: If (AE_NormalUnackedCount("[Steris_Decon]*") > 0) OR (AE_InAlmUnackedCount("[Steris_Decon]*") > 0) Then 1 Else If AE_InAlmAckedCount("[Steris_Decon]*") > 0 Then 2 Else 0

caption.caption: /*N:2 [Steris_Decon]Date_time[2] NOFILL DP:0*/./*N:2 [Steris_Decon]Date_time[1] NOFILL DP:0*/./*N:4 [Steris_Decon]Date_time[0] NOFILL DP:0*/ /*N:2 [Steris_Decon]Date_time[3] ZEROFILL DP:0*/:/*N:2 [Steris_Decon]Date_time[4] ZEROFILL DP:0*/:/*N:2 [Steris_Decon]Date_time[5] ZEROFILL DP:0*/

eSignature.ConfirmationMessage: By completing this action, I certify that I have reviewed the changes that will be made to the system. I have approval and permission to perform this change.

text.name: Text11
text.caption: HARD DISK SPACE LOW! /*N:7 {Steris_Decon\DriveAvailableSpace} NOFILL DP:2*/ GB OF SPACE LEFT!

vbaItem.vbaCode:
Public MyTagGroup As TagGroup
Private Sub Display_AnimationStart()
ShowFreeSpace CrateFolders
End Sub
Private Sub CurrentUsername_Change() 'This client: Logged in username changed ; Both clients: Both logged out - Download current username and password level to the PLC
On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
'Check if This client is logged in OR if both clients are logged out If (Me.Application.CurrentUserHasCode("E") Or (LoggedNS.Value = 0 And LoggedST.Value = 0)) And ServiceHMIControlStatus.Value = 0 Then ' Send current user level to PLC If Application.CurrentUserHasCode("A") Then 'PasswordLevelToPLC.Value = 5 ExecuteCommand "Set {[Steris_Decon]Password_level} 5" ElseIf Application.CurrentUserHasCode("B") Then 'PasswordLevelToPLC.Value = 4 ExecuteCommand "Set {[Steris_Decon]Password_level} 4" ElseIf Application.CurrentUserHasCode("C") Then 'PasswordLevelToPLC.Value = 3 ExecuteCommand "Set {[Steris_Decon]Password_level} 3" ElseIf Application.CurrentUserHasCode("D") Then 'PasswordLevelToPLC.Value = 2 ExecuteCommand "Set {[Steris_Decon]Password_level} 2" ElseIf Application.CurrentUserHasCode("E") Then 'PasswordLevelToPLC.Value = 1 ExecuteCommand "Set {[Steris_Decon]Password_level} 1" Else 'PasswordLevelToPLC.Value = 0 ExecuteCommand "Set {[Steris_Decon]Password_level} 0" End If
ExecuteCommand "Set {[Steris_Decon]User_name_full} """ & CurrentUsername.Value & """" 'Send user name to the PLC
LogDiagnosticsMessage "User logged in: " & CurrentUsername.Value, ftDiagSeverityAudit, ftDiagAudienceOperator ' Log user login operation to audit log
End If
Exit Sub
ErrorHandler: LogDiagnosticsMessage "VBA Error - Screen Name: " & Me.FullName & ", Procedure Name: CurrentUsername_Change(): " & Hex(Err.Number) & " - " & Err.Description, ftDiagSeverityError Resume Next
End Sub
Private Sub CurrentUsername1_Change() 'Download current username to PLC 'CurrentUsername_Change End Sub
Private Sub LoggedNS_Change() 'Check if both clients are logged out; to reset user level in the PLC If LoggedNS.Value = 0 And LoggedST.Value = 0 Then CurrentUsername_Change End If End Sub
Private Sub LoggedST_Change() 'Check if both clients are logged out; to reset user level in the PLC If LoggedST.Value = 0 And LoggedNS.Value = 0 Then CurrentUsername_Change End If End Sub
Private Sub RSView32SEIdleDetectControl1_EnterIdleState()
End Sub
Private Sub SystemHour_Change() ShowFreeSpace End Sub
Sub ShowFreeSpace() On Error GoTo ErrorHandler drvPath = "c:\" Dim fs, d, s
Dim total_size As Double Dim used_space As Double Dim available_space As Double
Set fs = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject") Set d = fs.GetDrive(fs.GetDriveName(drvPath))
total_size = FormatNumber(d.TotalSize / 1024 / 1024 / 1024, 2) used_space = total_size - FormatNumber(d.AvailableSpace / 1024 / 1024 / 1024, 2) available_space = FormatNumber(d.AvailableSpace / 1024 / 1024 / 1024, 2)
ExecuteCommand "Set {Steris_Decon\DriveTotalSpace} " & total_size ExecuteCommand "Set {Steris_Decon\DriveUsedSpace} " & used_space ExecuteCommand "Set {Steris_Decon\DriveAvailableSpace} " & available_space
Exit Sub ErrorHandler: LogDiagnosticsMessage "VBA Error - Screen Name: " & Me.FullName & ", Procedure Name: ShowFreeSpace(): " & Hex(Err.Number) & " - " & Err.Description, ftDiagSeverityError Resume Next
End Sub
Sub CrateFolders() On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
'If not already existing, create folders necessary for storing audit and batch data strFolderData = "C:\Data\" strFolderBatch = "C:\Data\Reports\" strFolderBatchArchive = "C:\Data\Reports_Archive\" strFolderAudit = "C:\Data\Audit\" strFolderAuditArchive = "C:\Data\Audit_Archive\"
Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
If Not fso.FolderExists(strFolderData) Then 'Create folder fso.CreateFolder (strFolderData) End If If Not fso.FolderExists(strFolderBatch) Then 'Create folder fso.CreateFolder (strFolderBatch) End If If Not fso.FolderExists(strFolderBatchArchive) Then 'Create folder fso.CreateFolder (strFolderBatchArchive) End If If Not fso.FolderExists(strFolderAudit) Then 'Create folder fso.CreateFolder (strFolderAudit) End If If Not fso.FolderExists(strFolderAuditArchive) Then 'Create folder fso.CreateFolder (strFolderAuditArchive) End If
Exit Sub ErrorHandler: LogDiagnosticsMessage "VBA Error - Screen Name: " & Me.FullName & ", Procedure Name: CrateFolders(): " & Hex(Err.Number) & " - " & Err.Description, ftDiagSeverityError Resume Next
End Sub
Private Sub ServiceHMIControlStatus_Change() If ServiceHMIControlStatus.Value = 0 And LoggedNS.Value = 1 And LoggedST.Value = 0 Then CurrentUsername_Change End If End Sub Private Sub TriggerFileTransfer_Change() 'Initialize variables used by ErrorHandler Dim Pass As Long Dim PauseTime, Start On Error GoTo ErrorHandler
'Initialize variables Dim file As Variant Dim Path_src_reports, Path_dst, Path_archive_reports, Path_src_audit, Path_archive_audit, Archive_log_cmd As String Dim Transfer_status, Transfer_trigger, Transfer_audit, Transfer_reports_txt As Tag Dim oFile, oFilesSrc, oFolderSrc, oShell As Object
'Start file transfer If TriggerFileTransfer.Value = 1 Then
'Create Tag Group and add tags to it If MyTagGroup Is Nothing Then Set MyTagGroup = Application.CreateTagGroup(Me.AreaName) MyTagGroup.Add "{[Steris_Decon]HMI.Transfer_path}" MyTagGroup.Add "{[Steris_Decon]HMI.Transfer_status}" MyTagGroup.Add "{[Steris_Decon]HMI.Trigger_transfer}" MyTagGroup.Add "{[Steris_Decon]HMI.Transfer_audit}" MyTagGroup.Add "{[Steris_Decon]HMI.Transfer_reports_txt}" MyTagGroup.Add "{[Steris_Decon]HMI.Transfer_reports_pdf}" End If
'Initialize variables Path_src_reports = "C:\Data\Reports\" Path_archive_reports = "C:\Data\Reports_Archive\" Path_dst = MyTagGroup.Item("{[Steris_Decon]HMI.Transfer_path}").Value Path_src_audit = "C:\Data\Audit\" Path_archive_audit = "C:\Data\Audit_Archive\"
'Initialize tag variables Set fso = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject") Set Transfer_status = MyTagGroup.Item("{[Steris_Decon]HMI.Transfer_status}") Set Transfer_audit = MyTagGroup.Item("{[Steris_Decon]HMI.Transfer_audit}") Set Transfer_reports_txt = MyTagGroup.Item("{[Steris_Decon]HMI.Transfer_reports_txt}") Set Transfer_reports_pdf = MyTagGroup.Item("{[Steris_Decon]HMI.Transfer_reports_pdf}")
Transfer_status.Value = 3 'Status number 3 means "Transferring"
'1 sec delay to keep the status "transferring" showing Dim Delay, Start2, Finish, TotalTime Delay = 1 ' Set duration. Start2 = Timer ' Set start time. Do While Timer < Start2 + Delay DoEvents ' Yield to other processes. Loop
'Destination directory syntax is incorrect, must end with slash If Not Right(Path_dst, 1) = "\" Then Transfer_status.Value = 6 End If
'Destination directory not found If Not fso.FolderExists(Path_dst) Then Transfer_status.Value = 5 End If
'If status is ok, start file transfer If Transfer_status.Value = 3 Then
'Log audit trail entry about beginning of file transfer LogDiagnosticsMessage "Starting network file transfer to location " & Path_dst, ftDiagSeverityAudit, ftDiagAudienceOperator
No_reports = 1 No_audits = 1 'Transfer reports If (Transfer_reports_txt.Value = 1) Or (Transfer_reports_pdf.Value = 1) Then file = Dir(Path_src_reports) While (file <> "") If Not fso.FolderExists(Path_dst) Then 'Check for the destination before each file Transfer_status.Value = 5 'Destination directory not found End If If Transfer_status.Value = 3 Then 'Move .txt reports If Transfer_reports_txt.Value = 1 And InStr(file, ".txt") > 0 Then fso.CopyFile Path_src_reports & file, Path_archive_reports 'Copy file to archive folder Name Path_src_reports & file As Path_dst & file 'Move file from src to dst No_reports = 0 End If 'Move .pdf reports If Transfer_reports_pdf.Value = 1 And InStr(file, ".pdf") > 0 Then fso.CopyFile Path_src_reports & file, Path_archive_reports 'Copy file to archive folder Name Path_src_reports & file As Path_dst & file 'Move file from src to dst No_reports = 0 End If file = Dir End If Wend End If
'Transfer audit trail files If (Transfer_audit.Value = 1) And (Transfer_status.Value = 3) Then file = Dir(Path_src_audit) 'Wevtutil command line tool is used to save the event log that is currently open and being written by FTDiagnostic service Archive_log_cmd = "wevtutil cl " & "FTDiag /bu:" & Path_src_audit & "FTDiag-" & Format(Now(), "yyyymmdd_hhmmss") & ".evtx" Set oShell = CreateObject("WScript.shell") Set oFolderSrc = fso.GetFolder(Path_src_audit) Set oFilesSrc = oFolderSrc.Files 'Run shell command with shell window hidden, wait until finished oShell.Run "cmd /C " & Archive_log_cmd, 0, True
For Each oFile In oFilesSrc If InStr(fso.GetBaseName(oFile), "FTDiag-") > 0 Then fso.CopyFile oFile, Path_archive_audit fso.MoveFile oFile, Path_dst No_audits = 0 End If Next Set oShell = Nothing End If
'One second timer to make sure that the file copying is done before refreshing the file view Delay = 1 ' Set duration. Start2 = Timer ' Set start time. Do While Timer < Start2 + Delay DoEvents ' Yield to other processes. Loop End If
'Set transfer trigger to zero Set Transfer_trigger = MyTagGroup.Item("{[Steris_Decon]HMI.Trigger_transfer}") Transfer_trigger.Value = 0
'Update status If Transfer_status.Value = 3 Then If No_reports And No_audits Then Transfer_status.Value = 4 'No files to transfer Else Transfer_status.Value = 1 'Transfer succeeded 'Log audit trail entry about successful transfer LogDiagnosticsMessage "Network file transfer ended successfully.", ftDiagSeverityAudit, ftDiagAudienceOperator End If End If
'Destroy tag group Set MyTagGroup = Nothing End If
Exit Sub
ErrorHandler: Select Case Err.Number Case &H80040F80 PauseTime = 1 ' Set duration. Start = Timer ' Set start time. Do While Timer < Start + PauseTime DoEvents ' Yield to other processes. Loop ' need to handle situation where there is an actual fault preventing a tag read, therefore ' used variable Pass to allow a number of failures (in this case 5) before handling as ' true failure If Pass > 5 Then LogDiagnosticsMessage "VBA Error - Screen Name: " & Me.FullName & ", Procedure Name: TriggerFileTransfer_Change(): " & Hex(Err.Number) & " - " & Err.Description, ftDiagSeverityError If Not MyTagGroup Is Nothing Then Transfer_status.Value = 7 'Failed to read CPU tags End If Set MyTagGroup = Nothing Exit Sub Else Pass = Pass + 1 Resume 'returns to line that failed and tries again End If Case Else LogDiagnosticsMessage "VBA Error - Screen Name: " & Me.FullName & ", Procedure Name: TriggerFileTransfer_Change(): " & Hex(Err.Number) & " - " & Err.Description, ftDiagSeverityError If Not MyTagGroup Is Nothing Then Transfer_status.Value = 2 'Transfer failed End If Set MyTagGroup = Nothing Exit Sub End Select End Sub
Private Sub Display_BeforeAnimationStop() 'Destroy tag group Set MyTagGroup = Nothing End Sub
